name: Good — serviceable, no significant defects (TfNSW Condition 1)
Fair — moderate deterioration, attention warranted (TfNSW Condition 2)
Poor — significant defects, active management required (TfNSW Condition 3)
Very Poor — major defects, urgent repairs required (TfNSW Condition 4)
Critical — imminent failure risk, immediate action required (TfNSW Condition 5)
